---
title: "Practical 2 Tools"
output: html_document
---

## Introduction

The aim of this practical is to provide an overview of the tools that will be used in the course, including installation and usage instructions.

## Tools Overview

1. **Tool A**: Description and usage.
2. **Tool B**: Description and usage.
3. **Tool C**: Description and usage.

## Installation Instructions

```{r}
# Install Tool A
install.packages('ToolA')

# Install Tool B
install.packages('ToolB')
```

## Usage Instructions

```{r}
# Load Tool A
library(ToolA)

# Load Tool B
library(ToolB)
```

## Conclusion

In this practical, you have learned about the essential tools for the course. Make sure to install them properly before proceeding to the next practical.
